author: y4rr
content: Observation: Embedding forward ALREADY has a GPU fast path (embed_lookup_batch_f32) for f32 CUDA tensors at embedding.rs:351-381. The CPU path at lines 384+ only runs for non-f32 GPU or missing backend. The audit agent's finding was a false positive — the .cpu() call is in the fallback path, not the hot path. Closing as already implemented.
